rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §86.0052 prohibits ballot-harvesting compensation schemes. The two provisions govern unrelated subject matter with no operative intersection.
quote: Sec. 86.0052. COMPENSATION FOR CARRIER ENVELOPE ACTION PROHIBITED.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict exists.
